about.heading: About Me
about.description:
Fresh graduate in Informatics Engineering with a GPA of 3.86/4.00 from Universitas Dipa Makassar. Experienced in full-stack
web development, and UI/UX design through hands-on academic and personal projects. Skilled in general IT troubleshooting, network configuration, and system maintenance. Quick learner with strong teamwork, problem-solving, and communication skills. Eager to contribute to a professional technology environment

projects.title: Digital Inventory & Stock Management App
projects.description: Web-based inventory management featuring real-time Data Barang tracking and Stok Opname auditing.

detail.longDescription: A comprehensive web-based inventory management system designed for small-to-medium businesses. The application provides real-time tracking of product stock levels, automated low-stock alerts, and a full Stok Opname (stock audit) workflow that compares physical counts with system records. The backend is powered by Native with a well-structured MySQL schema, while the frontend delivers a clean, responsive UI built with BootstrapCSS.
highlights: Real-time stock tracking with automatic update on every transaction
Full Stok Opname (audit) module with discrepancy reporting
Role-based access control — Admin, Gudang, and Viewer roles
PDF & Excel export for audit reports
Responsive dashboard with stock summary charts
Equipped with demand forecasts of future supply requirements

projects.title: Agricultural Tech Solution (Palm Oil Plantation Management Concept)
projects.description: A data-driven system for management, yield tracking, and logistics for palm oil plantation operations.

detail.longDescription: A concept system for digitalizing palm oil plantation management — from planting records and fertilization schedules to yield tracking and delivery logistics. The project demonstrates a normalized database schema capable of handling multi-block plantation data, worker assignments, and harvest batch tracing. Designed as a proof-of-concept for agricultural SMEs looking to move from spreadsheet-based tracking to a centralized web platform.
highlights: Multi-block plantation management with GPS block mapping concept
Yield tracking per block with monthly comparison reports
Logistics module for delivery batch management
Normalized relational database design (3NF) for scalability
